form.formComment: Comes here off a 49-day let-up. Last start 10th of 12 at this track on February 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Lucky Generations carrying 61kg at $11. Before that 7th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Somelovefromabove with 54.5kg at $73. Rates highly and can break through.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months ran last of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 12 len behind Somelovefromabove with 52kg at $49. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at this track on October 15 over 1200m, 6 len behind Dancing Classics carrying 56kg at $14. Expecting him to kick on with that first run out of the way.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1000m, 3 len behind Elegant Life with 60kg at $8.50. The run before that 5th of 12 at this track on February 11 over 1000m, 4 len behind Macanese Master carrying 61kg at $4.70. Nice trial recently and he can return to form.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 12 at Sha Tin All Weather on April 1 over 1200m, 3 len behind Viva Chaleur carrying 57.5kg at $11. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Elegant Life with 56.5kg at $5.30. Going well and can go one better this time.
